reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Viaje desde Zapala (Neuquén) hasta Clorinda. Algo de 2200 kilómetros. Pare en un monton de estaciones donde todos fueron muy amables y atentos. Hasta que llegue a cargar combustible aquí.
Primero me hicieron salir de la fila y me cambiaron de lugar. Pensé que ya no había combustible en ese surtidor. Pero no. Me hicieron esperar atendiendo a otra gente en vez de a mi. Y luego me dijeron que solo me podían cargar la más cara. Yo pedí super (95octanos)
Y me dijeron que no cargan a chapa extranjera así. Es una lástima como actua esta gente. No cargue y me fui y en la Shell me cargaron sin problemas.

(Translated by Google)
I traveled from Zapala (Neuquén) to Clorinda, about 2200 kilometers. I stopped at a lot of gas stations where everyone was very friendly and helpful, until I finally got here to fill up.

First, they made me leave the line and moved me to another station. I thought there was no more fuel at that pump. But no. They made me wait while they served other people instead of me. And then they told me they could only give me the most expensive fuel. I asked for premium (95 octane).

And they told me they don't fill up with foreign license plates like that. It's a shame how these people act. I didn't fill up and left, and at the Shell station, they filled up for me without any problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobnZudnlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estaba de vacaciones con mi flia y con mi niña con autismo, a pesar de formar la fila para cargar cuando nos tocó cargar fuimos expulsados por un Playero llamado Natalio que nos dijo no había NAFTA para Extranjeros. Mi única mala experiencia en las vacaciones porque después lo pase de 10 fui hasta Bariloche pero no gracias a YPF

(Translated by Google)
I was on vacation with my family and my daughter with autism. Despite waiting in line to fill up, when it was our turn, we were kicked out by an attendant named Natalio who told us there was no gasoline for foreigners. That was my only bad experience on vacation because otherwise everything was fantastic. I even went to Bariloche, but not thanks to YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoenVLcU1BEAE
